PluginData.Author: Viktor
PluginData.Tooltip: Stops the simulation of grids if far away from all online players
PluginData.Description:
Concealment is a server-side Space Engineers plugin for Magnetar that reduces dedicated server load by skipping work that only matters on a graphical client.
It uses Harmony patches — for example disabling LCD text-panel visibility updates on the dedicated server — to cut needless CPU and network overhead. Patches are guarded by startup code-change detection so they fail-safe when a Space Engineers update alters the patched methods, and the plugin is configured through the Magnetar PluginSdk with its UI rendered by Quasar.
Functionality is inspired by and reimplements the original Torch plugin Concealment by TorchAPI: https://github.com/TorchAPI/Concealment
